overall.description: A cinematic game engine rendering of a cyberpunk city street at night. The stationary camera captures a neon-lit vending machine and wet asphalt as pedestrians and a vehicle cross the intersection.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a rain-slicked cyberpunk street corner dominated by a glowing green vending machine on the right. Neon signs illuminate the tall industrial buildings in the background. An adult pedestrian crosses the striped crosswalk from left to right, their reflection visible on the wet pavement.

segments.scene_description: The street remains quiet with the neon vending machine glowing steadily. A child pedestrian crosses the wet intersection from left to right, passing in front of the vending machine. The background buildings remain illuminated by various neon signs.

segments.scene_description: The street is temporarily empty of pedestrians. A dark sedan drives through the intersection from left to right, its headlights reflecting off the wet pavement. The neon vending machine continues to glow on the right side of the frame as the vehicle passes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a stationary view of a rain-slicked cyberpunk street corner that transitions from a pedestrian crossing to the passage of a vehicle. It begins with a glowing green vending machine dominating the right side of the frame as an adult pedestrian crosses the striped intersection, their reflection shimmering on the wet asphalt. As the first person departs, the scene remains quiet under the neon glow of industrial buildings before a child pedestrian follows the same path across the street. The intersection then clears momentarily, shifting the focus to the reflective pavement before a dark sedan drives through the frame from left to right. Finally, the vehicle's headlights sweep across the wet ground, leaving the neon-lit corner once again in its steady, atmospheric glow.
